prompt: Create a cinematic anime-style close-up portrait of a mysterious forest nymph facing directly forward, filling the frame from forehead to chin with an intense calm expression. She has porcelain skin with subtle freckles, glossy rose lips, dark wet-looking tousled hair, and large luminous turquoise green eyes with highly detailed lashes and reflective catchlights. Adorn her face with symmetrical sparkling crystal and gold leaf ornaments under both eyes and across the bridge of her nose, like delicate tears and fairy makeup. Add long dangling iridescent gemstone earrings on both sides. Frame her head with a crown of deep teal leaves and small pale blue flowers, with thin vines and loose strands of hair crossing the image. Surround her with an enchanted nighttime forest atmosphere in deep teal, midnight blue, warm gold, and soft rose, including glowing fireflies, tiny butterflies, floating dust motes, bokeh orbs, and warm rim light from the right side. Use dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, shallow depth of field, painterly yet hyper-detailed anime illustration, intricate linework, luminous skin texture, ethereal fantasy mood, ultra-detailed eyes, cinematic widescreen composition, no text, no watermark.
